name: Skills Library 3 - Ecosystem Intake
description: Curated ecosystem expansion tracks for BSC developers.

skills.name: Four.Meme Agent Skill
skills.description: Bridges the upstream four-meme-ai CLI into SkillHub agents for create/buy/sell/send flows.
skills.author: four-meme-community

skills.name: Four.Meme Create Pipeline
skills.description: Plans and executes the two-step Four.meme token creation flow (create-api -> create-chain) with mandatory confirmations and key/fee checks.
skills.author: skillshub-curation
skills.sourceAttribution: fourmeme official CLI and protocol docs

skills.name: Four.Meme Trade Playbook
skills.description: Builds quote-first buy/sell execution plans on Four.meme with slippage, max-loss, and post-trade reconciliation guardrails.
skills.author: skillshub-curation
skills.sourceAttribution: fourmeme official CLI and protocol docs

skills.name: Four.Meme Agentic Ops
skills.description: Orchestrates agentic Four.meme loops (discover -> score -> confirm -> execute -> monitor) with read-first safety gates.
skills.author: skillshub-curation
skills.sourceAttribution: fourmeme official CLI and protocol docs

skills.name: Four.Meme One-Stop Launch
skills.description: Provides one-stop Four.meme workflow: create token, buy execution, tweet material generation, ERC8004 identity checks, and operator auth/revoke controls.
skills.author: skillshub-curation
skills.sourceAttribution: fourmeme official CLI and ERC-8004 draft references

skills.name: Four.Meme Graduation Radar
skills.description: Tracks graduation and migration signals from Four.meme bonding curves to Pancake liquidity using rankings, listing flags, and LiquidityAdded events.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: Four.Meme Tax Token Guard
skills.description: Plans TaxToken creation with fee-split sanity checks, anti-sniping defaults, explicit confirmation gates, and post-launch tax-info reconciliation.
skills.author: skillshub-curation
skills.sourceAttribution: four-meme-community/four-meme-ai tax options + Four.meme tax-token docs

skills.name: Four.Meme Mempool Sentinel
skills.description: Builds real-time pending-transaction watchlists for Four.meme and upgrades alerts only after event-level confirmation, reducing false positives.
skills.author: skillshub-curation
skills.sourceAttribution: Bitquery Four Meme Mempool APIs + community MCP workflow references

skills.name: Four.Meme Bitquery Query Kit
skills.description: Provides a query-first analytics toolkit for Four.meme using Bitquery GraphQL/streams (trades, bonding progress, migrations, liquidity, and trader behavior).
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: Four.Meme MCP Ops Guard
skills.description: Hardens Four.meme MCP-server operations with read-only defaults, explicit trade confirmations, and secret-isolation policies.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: FinClaw Meme Monitor Playbook
skills.description: Adapts FinClaw's social-signal and market-analysis flow into a Four.meme candidate discovery and manual-launch decision playbook.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: ERC8004 Fast Auth
skills.description: Provides fast ERC-8004/ERC-721 operator authorization and revoke runbook for agent wallets with least-privilege controls.
skills.author: skillshub-curation
skills.sourceAttribution: ERC-8004 draft spec plus fourmeme 8004 CLI hooks

skills.name: BSC NFT Ops Guide
skills.description: Guides ERC-721 metadata, ownership checks, and transfer-safe operational flow on BSC.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: BitAgent Bonding Playbook
skills.description: Provides guarded execution playbook for launch/buy/sell flows on BSC bonding-curve products.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: Multichain Portfolio Tracker
skills.description: Outlines cross-chain portfolio analysis workflow for TRON/ETH/BSC with position and fee breakdown.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: PancakeSwap Trading Guard
skills.description: Builds pre-trade checklist and execution guardrails for BSC PancakeSwap workflows.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: ERC8004 Agent Registry
skills.description: Generates deployment and operation checklist for ERC-8004-style agent identity and reputation registries.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: Prediction Market CLOB
skills.description: Provides orderbook trading and risk-control playbook for BSC prediction-market CLOB integrations.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: Committee Prediction Market
skills.description: Adapts GouGouBi's committee-based prediction market skill for BSC proposal creation, committee workflows, dispute arbitration, governance rewards, and YES/NO CPMM trading.
skills.author: frank

inputExample.proposalSkills: Use Binance BTCUSDT daily close; settle in Beijing time; fetch final close before committee settlement vote.

skills.name: KryptoGO Cluster Radar (Read-Only)
skills.description: Adapts KryptoGO's cluster/whale/smart-money analysis workflow for BSC-focused token intelligence; this integration only includes analysis modules.
skills.author: skillshub-curation

skills.name: SyncX Multi-Platform Publisher
skills.description: Integrates the open-source SyncX workflow for one-command cross-posting to Binance Square and X/Twitter, with optional Telegram and Threads publishing.
skills.author: SyncX2026

inputExample.text: BTC retrace then continuation; watch 4h structure.

skills.installCommand: git clone https://github.com/SyncX2026/SyncX && cd SyncX/skills/syncx && python3 scripts/publish_sync.py --init-config

excludedDirections.note: Default mode avoids autonomous hot-wallet trade execution without explicit user confirmation.
No plaintext private-key handling inside generated examples or outputs.
MEV sandwich-bot style execution (for example fuzzland/fourmeme-god) is excluded from this library's default support scope.
